scripts.dev: concurrently -n "AUTH,PATIENT,ADMIN,DOCTOR,REPORT,APPOINTMENT" -c "cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue,red" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:patient" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:doctor" "npm run start:report" "npm run start:appointment"

concurrently -n "AUTH,PATIENT,ADMIN,DOCTOR,APPOINTMENT,NOTIFICATION,PAYMENT,TELEMEDICINE,REPORT" -c "cyan,green,magenta,blue,yellow,red,white,gray,cyan" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:patient" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:doctor" "npm run start:appointment" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:telemedicine" "npm run start:mediaclreport"
